title: Fire-Prevention and Protection Engineers
description: Research causes of fires, determine fire protection methods, and design or recommend materials or equipment such as structural components or fire-detection equipment to assist organizations in safeguarding life and property against fire, explosion, and related hazards.

tasks.text: Advise architects, builders, and other construction personnel on fire prevention equipment and techniques and on fire code and standard interpretation and compliance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design fire detection equipment, alarm systems, and fire extinguishing devices and systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect buildings or building designs to determine fire protection system requirements and potential problems in areas such as water supplies, exit locations, and construction materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review building plans to verify compliance with fire code.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and write reports detailing specific fire prevention and protection issues, such as work performed, revised codes or standards, and proposed review schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with authorities to discuss safety regulations and to recommend changes as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate fire department performance and the laws and regulations affecting fire prevention or fire safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the purchase, modification, installation, testing, maintenance, and operation of fire prevention and protection systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend workshops, seminars, or conferences to present or obtain information regarding fire prevention and protection.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine causes of fires and ways in which they could have been prevented.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop training materials and conduct training sessions on fire protection.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study the relationships between ignition sources and materials to determine how fires start.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop plans for the prevention of destruction by fire, wind, and water.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research on fire retardants and the fire safety of materials and devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
